text.title: API Versioning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the pending change a breaking semantic change?

conclusion.verdict: ship as additive in current major version; no bump
use @deprecated + persisted queries; load graphql-api-design instead
create vN+1 in a separate module; mark vN deprecated

text.example: openapi diff shows 1 BREAKING (removed field email_verified) → decision=vN+1 → copy /api/v1/users handler to /api/v2/users with the field removed → mark v1 route deprecated in ops/sunset.yaml → measure traffic → 410 Gone on sunset date → delete handler after 30d zero traffic.
